SUBJECT: The wait is finally over...

convertlinks

Well, it seems like it's been forever, but
we're finally ready to go with our SMARTS
Coaching Program.

It goes live TODAY at 2:00pm eastern time.

Here's the link.

A quick warning... I don't want to sound all
hypey, but there seems like there's a lot of
interest in the program.

We've had over 179,000 people watch our Going
Natural 2.0 videos.

And we've had over 23,000 people join our
list since we started Going Natural 2.0.

And look at all the blog comments in the last
12 hours or so.

The bottom line is we have a TON of people
lined up for SMARTS, and we don't have many
spots at all (I don't have the exact number,
but I should within the next 24 hours... we
are finalizing our tech choices for the
program. But it's going to be pretty small).

So if you think this might be for you, then
go take a look now. I don't want the rug
pulled out from under you.

Here's the link.

best regards,
Andy


P.S. Right after we go live, I'm going to bed.
Can't quite remember the last time I got more
than four hours of sleep.
